# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

.gitlab-ci.yml
stages:
  - build
  - deploy:staging
  - deploy:production

variables:
  BINARIES_DIR: "build/bin"
  CONFIGS_DIR: "build/config"
  ARTIFACT_NAME_PREFIX: "my_app_artifacts"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir -p $BINARIES_DIR
    - mkdir -p $CONFIGS_DIR
    - echo "simulated binary content" > $BINARIES_DIR/app_server
    - echo "simulated binary content" > $BINARIES_DIR/worker_service
    - echo "config_param_1=value_1" > $CONFIGS_DIR/app_config.ini
    - echo "config_param_2=value_2" > $CONFIGS_DIR/service_config.yaml
    - echo "Build completed."
  artifacts:
    name: "$ARTIFACT_NAME_PREFIX-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
    paths:
      - $BINARIES_DIR/
      - $CONFIGS_DIR/
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy_to_staging:
  stage: deploy:staging
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - ls -R
    - echo "Executing $BINARIES_DIR/app_server with $CONFIGS_DIR/app_config.ini on staging"
    - cat $CONFIGS_DIR/app_config.ini
    - echo "Deployment to staging complete."
  dependencies:
    - build_job

deploy_to_production:
  stage: deploy:production
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - ls -R
    - echo "Executing $BINARIES_DIR/app_server with $CONFIGS_DIR/app_config.ini on production"
    - cat $CONFIGS_DIR/app_config.ini
    - echo "Deployment to production complete."
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  when: manual
